Preterit.turoyo: azzé maškele 385; prs 137/20; maškalle ʕal ḥḏoḏe 386; prs 164/11; azzino maškeli gab u=rabo, u=rabo omər sūmne! ono ṭləbli mine u=šuġl-awo w-hiye lo=maqbele w-aṯyono maškeli aʕle
translations:
‘I demanded “the thing” from him, but he did not agree. Than
			I went and complained about him’ 78/234;

Infectum.turoyo: duš maškena ʕal ḥḏoḏe 395; prs 121/4; prs 225/16; g-əzzehən l-Miḏyaḏ w-g-əzzehən l-Diyārbắkər, g-maškən aʕlan, gd-əṯyo i=ḥkuma, w-latlan taqa d-i=ḥkuma
translations:
‘They
			are going to go to Midyat and to Diyarbakir and they are going to
			inform against us, and (then) the government will come, and we
			have no strength against the government’ 71/18;

Imperative.turoyo: zəx aškáy s-u=rabo d-at=taʕle 407; prs 195/6; aḥna, u=māl-ano, šqilan b-ak=kallat-ayḏan. d-ubʕət maškay!
translations:
geh
			klage beim Häuptling der Füchse
